titleStmt.title: SII 20.155: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 155. (B.K. No. 52 of 1937-38.) NIMBĀḶ, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Fragment of stone lying in the compound of Śaṅkaraliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 8, Jaya, Chaitra, śu. 2, Monday. The details of the date correspond to A.D. 1174, March 6, when the week-day was Wednesday and not Monday.
The inscription records a gift of land, house-sites etc., to the temple of Kōṭiśaṅkaradēva of Niṁbahaḷḷa by Vārarasa, the prabhu of Taḍavalage, and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu kaḷacuryyabhujabaḷacakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēvavari
ṣada jaya saṁvatsada caitra su 2 sōmavāradaṁdu taḍavalage prabhu vā
rarasa basavarasaṁ bīcarasa bhūtaraśa bijjarasa mēlāḷike rāveya
sāhaṇiyintivaru mukṣavāgi samasta Eṁṭṭu hiṭṭu stāna māniyayoḷarāgi taṁRead mānyadoḷagāgi.
mmūra holadoḷage niṁbahaḷḷada sīmeya candanaṇeyiṁ mūḍa maṇaliya ha
ḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu subhūmimāgi hiriya kōla mattaru 25 maneya nivēsaṇa
1 huṇuseya mara 1 yi(ṁ)ntinituvaṁ niṁbahaḷḷada śrī kōṭisaṁkharadēvari
ge dhārāpūrvvaka māḍi sarvvanamasya biṭṭa vritti . mata vā goṇavalageyalu mane nivēsa
ṇa 1 huṇuseya mara 1 .
Digital edition of SII 20.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
